integrationsExt.fanvueLead: Multiple creator accounts. Model on connection — chats inherit it automatically.
integrationsExt.igDevBanner: Instagram Direct integration is still in development. Account connection is temporarily unavailable — we'll notify you when it's ready.
integrationsExt.igSteps: Select a model and click «Add Instagram» — sign in with a Business or Creator account.
integrationsExt.igDmHint: New DMs appear under Chats → Instagram. Reply within 24 h.
integrationsExt.tributeLead: Tips and subscriptions via <link>Tribute API</link>. Setup steps below. Chatter share in KPI is set per member in Team.
integrationsExt.tributeStep1: In Tribute creator panel: ⋯ → Settings → API Keys → Generate API Key — copy the key.
integrationsExt.tributeStep2: Here: select model (which profile revenue belongs to), paste API key and click «Add Tribute».
integrationsExt.tributeStep3: After saving copy Webhook URL from the connection card into Tribute: Settings → API → Webhooks.
integrationsExt.tributeStep4: New payments arrive via webhook, are stored in DB and appear in Overview KPI.
integrationsExt.tributeApiKeyPh: Api-Key from Tribute → Settings → API Keys
integrationsExt.llmBody: Studio prompts and vision always use the AI key set by admin on the server (OPENAI_API_KEY / compatible base). Fields below are unused by studio and kept for future use.
integrationsExt.companionFbLead: Nightly summary of 👍/👎 on bot replies. Rate messages in chat — report updates automatically.
integrationsExt.companionFbEmpty: No reports yet — they appear after first ratings and nightly run.
integrationsExt.pushBody: Browser notifications for new chat messages.
integrationsExt.pushDenied: Allow notifications for this site in browser settings.
integrationsExt.pushServerOff: Push notifications are not enabled on the server.

modelsExt.backstoryPh: where they're from, what they do, what matters…
modelsExt.exportPhoneHint: Phone reference EXIF matters more than preset. EXIF date — when saving frame. GEO — optional. Selfie or main camera — toggle on Images page when generating.
modelsExt.kpiEmpty: KPI will appear after first chatter replies in the period.
modelsExt.membersEmpty: No one yet — add the first member above.

health.modeLine: Mode: {{mode}} · total in DB: {{conversations}} chats, {{messages}} messages
